## What this changes

Brief description of the change and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Breaking change

## Checklist

- [ ] `go build ./...` passes
- [ ] `go vet ./...` passes
- [ ] `go test ./...` passes
- [ ] Added/updated tests for new logic where feasible
- [ ] Updated README.md if this adds/changes a flag, endpoint, or behavior
- [ ] Updated CHANGELOG.md

## How was this tested?

Describe how you verified this works (commands run, files used, results).
